hero.question: Will Connecticut win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 14.1%, the market is pricing Connecticut as a longshot with almost no realistic path to the title, meaning you're getting minimal expected value on a yes bet unless you see something sharp the crowd has missed. The Huskies made the Elite Eight last year, have NBA talent in their rotation, and play in the Big East, but 14% still feels about right for a mid-tier tournament team that needs to hit variance hard in March.

daily_take.headline: Connecticut's 14% Tournament Odds Look Cheap Against the Recruiting Momentum
daily_take.deck: UConn sits at 14.1% despite being a Final Four contender with elite recruiting classes rolling in. The market is pricing in historical underperformance, not current trajectory. Smart money sees a program in ascent that the efficient price hasn't caught up to yet. Buy the dip.
